name: Go outside, bro!
description: A mod to encourage you to go outside.

enable-notifications.name: Enable Notifications
enable-notifications.description: Disable this if you only want the playtime tracker.

test-mode.name: Test Mode
test-mode.description: If enabled, reminder notifications will appear every 5 seconds.

language-french.name: French Language
language-french.description: Enable French messages. Disable for English.

reminder-amount.name: Reminder Amount
reminder-amount.description: How often the reminder should appear.

notification-theme-white.name: White Notification Box
notification-theme-white.description: Enable white notification box. Disable for black.
